title: Senior Plant Manager at Britannia Industries

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Britannia Industries
jsonLd.description:
Britannia Industries has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Britannia Industries:
Britannia Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries!
